title: OpenMuCF rate-ledger row
description: One microscopic muCF rate or parameter, with provenance and uncertainty. Each row of data/rates.csv must satisfy this.

unc.description: 1-sigma-style uncertainty in the same unit; 0 if not quoted.

conditions.description: Structured-ish: T, phi, hyperfine F, ortho-para, c_t, field.

single_source.description: True if it traces to one never-independently-rechecked measurement (feeds the Phase-4 cross-source audit).

needs_verification.description: True if the exact digit/locator is not yet pinned from the primary text.
